title: Saildrone unveils new medium unmanned surface vessel for anti-sub warfare, ISR
description: The MUSV comes in two variants: the Spectre Silent Endurance, and the Spectre Stealth Strike.

title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
description: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.

title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
description: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.

title: Rivian’s factory hit by tornado ahead of R2 launch
description: Nobody was hurt after an EF-1 tornado hit the part of the factory where the R2 SUV is supposed to be built.

title: OpenAI’s existential questions
description: On the latest episode of Equity, we discuss OpenAI's latest acquisitions and whether they address "two big existential problems" for the company.

title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn put a customer satellite in the wrong orbit during its third launch
description: The first major failure of Blue Origin's new heavy-launch system could create delays to its ambition to help NASA and the Trump administration return to the moon.

title: AST Spacemobile BB7 Is Not Recoverable Per ASTS
description: ASTS admits the satellite is too low and cannot be saved. Based on what the orbit appears to be. 20kg of fuel they can only raise it part of the way. title: Blue Origin successfully re-uses a New Glenn rocket for the first time ever
description: It's a major milestone for the company's new mega-rocket system, putting it in position to challenge SpaceX's dominance of the global launch market.

title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
description: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.

title: Siemens and Humanoid test HMND 01 Alpha for logistics tasks
description:

title: OpenAI Executive Kevin Weil Is Leaving the Company
description: The former Instagram VP is departing the ChatGPT-maker, which is folding the AI science application he led into Codex.

description:

description:

description:

title: Musk v. Altman Is a Battle for OpenAI’s Soul
description: In Musk v. Altman, a jury will soon determine whether OpenAI has strayed from its founding mission to ensure AGI benefits humanity. Here’s what to know.

title: Starlink outage hit drone tests, exposing Pentagon’s growing reliance on SpaceX
description: Last August, a global outage across Elon Musk’s satellite network left U.S. Navy unmanned surface vessels bobbing off California, halting operations.

title: XAI Renting GPUs to Cursor – Further GPU Rents Enables Breakeven
description: It is being reported that xAI will rent tens of thousands of GPUS to AI coding company Cursor. It is about $2.5-18 per hour for GPU rentals. title: Anthropic Plots Major London Expansion
description: As tensions with the US government mount, Anthropic has leased a new office with enough space to quadruple its 200-person head count in London.

description:
Level 4 autonomous technology expert Nuro shared the latest milestone of a partnership with Uber Technologies and Lucid Motors to develop a fleet of Gravity Robotaxi SUVs. Per the company, a select group of riders has begun test rides in California.
